sources.quotedText: From Camanche Dam to Elliot Road. Jan. 1 through Mar. 31. 1 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 228902, "Mokelumne River", Stream, San Joaquin/Sacramento/Calaveras/Amador Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":228902,"gaz_name":"Mokelumne River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"San Joaquin"} — geometry multipoint; first point (Web Mercator -13533106.7135, 4593001.2817) converts to lon -121.569966, lat 38.096035, at the river's mouth in the Sacramento-San Joaquin Delta near Walnut Grove (confirmed against Wikipedia infobox mouth coordinate 38°05'46"N 121°34'12"W), replacing the file's previous coordinate (-121.2911, 38.1298), which was off by roughly 25 km (it had been set to the Elliot Road–Woodbridge Dam reach location instead of the river's canonical GNIS point).

regulations.humanSummary: Camanche Dam to Elliot Road: open Jan. 1–Mar. 31, fourth Sat. in May–Jul. 15, and Jul. 16–Oct. 15.
regulations.verbatimText: From Camanche Dam to Elliot Road. Jan. 1 through Mar. 31. || Fourth Sat. in May through Jul. 15. || Jul. 16 through Oct. 15.

parameters.counting_rule: 1 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead per day/in possession; only fish marked as hatchery-produced (adipose fin clipped, per the ** footnote) may be retained.

regulations.humanSummary: 1 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily and in possession, Camanche Dam to Elliot Road.

parameters.counting_rule: Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon.

regulations.humanSummary: Chinook Salmon may not be taken or possessed, Camanche Dam to Elliot Road.
regulations.verbatimText: Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon.

regulations.humanSummary: Elliot Road to Woodbridge Irrigation District Dam (including Lodi Lake): open Jan. 1–Jul. 15 and Jul. 16–Dec. 31.
regulations.verbatimText: From Elliot Road to the Woodbridge Irrigation District Dam including Lodi Lake. Jan. 1 through Jul. 15. || Jul. 16 through Dec. 31.

parameters.counting_rule: 1 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead per day/in possession; only fish marked as hatchery-produced (adipose fin clipped, per the ** footnote) may be retained.

regulations.humanSummary: 1 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily and in possession, Elliot Road to Woodbridge Dam including Lodi Lake.

parameters.counting_rule: Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon.

regulations.humanSummary: Chinook Salmon may not be taken or possessed, Elliot Road to Woodbridge Dam including Lodi Lake.
regulations.verbatimText: Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon.

parameters.note: Between the Woodbridge Irrigation District Dam and the Lower Sacramento Road bridge.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year between the Woodbridge Irrigation District Dam and the Lower Sacramento Road bridge.
regulations.verbatimText: Between the Woodbridge Irrigation District Dam and the Lower Sacramento Road bridge. Closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Lower Sacramento Road bridge to the mouth (including tributary sloughs east of Hwy 160, north of Hwy 12): open Jan. 1–Jul. 15, Jul. 16–Dec. 16, and Dec. 17–Dec. 31.
regulations.verbatimText: From the Lower Sacramento Road bridge to the mouth. For purposes of this subsection, this river segment is defined as Mokelumne River and its tributary sloughs downstream of the Lower Sacramento Road bridge and east of Highway 160 and north of Highway 12. Jan. 1 through Jul. 15. || Jul. 16 through Dec. 16. || Dec. 17 through Dec. 31.

parameters.counting_rule: 1 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead per day/in possession; only fish marked as hatchery-produced (adipose fin clipped, per the ** footnote) may be retained.

regulations.humanSummary: 1 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily and in possession, Lower Sacramento Road bridge to the mouth.

parameters.counting_rule: Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon.

regulations.humanSummary: Chinook Salmon may not be taken or possessed, Lower Sacramento Road bridge to the mouth.
regulations.verbatimText: Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
